title: Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC) Subcommittee on Animal Health: Agenda for January 19, 2021 web conference  - Canada.ca
content:
## Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC) Subcommittee on Animal Health: Agenda for January 19, 2021 web conference

## Tuesday, January 19, 2021, 2:30 - 5:00 pm Eastern standard time (EST)
Purpose: This web-conference of the SAC-HPCC Subcommittee on Animal Health will focus on the evidence regarding the safety and efficacy of cannabis use in animals, and will close by seeking the Subcommittee's initial views regarding the appropriate scope of products, populations of concern, and other topics.
Agenda January 19, 2021
Welcome and opening remarks Presenter: Committee Secretariat and Committee Co-Chair
Welcome and opening remarks
Presenter: Committee Secretariat and Committee Co-Chair
Current state of evidence for use in animals Presenter: Dr. Wayne McDonell, Professor Emeritus, Ontario Veterinary College, University of Guelph
Current state of evidence for use in animals

3:15 - 4:45 pm Working discussion

Lead: Policy Planning and International Affairs Directorate and Committee Co-Chair
Closing remarks Presenter: Veterinary Drugs Directorate and Committee Co-Chair
Presenter: Veterinary Drugs Directorate and Committee Co-Chair
